name: lakshx-structural-search
description: Find & replace by code SHAPE, not literal text — JetBrains-SSR-style structural search for JS/TS using placeholders ($FN, $$ARGS), with a mandatory preview-before-apply diff. Also includes a curated SAST-lite security scan (SQLi/XSS-class shapes) via the same matcher. Token-level structural match, not full AST or taint analysis — see README for scope.
